# ros2_cam_nbdev


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

This file will become your README and also the index of your

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install ros2_cam_nbdev in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure ros2_cam_nbdev package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to ros2_cam_nbdev
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/Ramon-PR/ros2_cam_nbdev):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/Ramon-PR/ros2_cam_nbdev.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/Ramon-PR/ros2_cam_nbdev)

``` sh
$ conda install -c Ramon-PR ros2_cam_nbdev
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/ros2_cam_nbdev/)

``` sh
$ pip install ros2_cam_nbdev
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/Ramon-PR/ros2_cam_nbdev)’s
[pages](https://Ramon-PR.github.io/ros2_cam_nbdev/). Additionally you
can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/Ramon-PR/ros2_cam_nbdev) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/ros2_cam_nbdev/) respectively.
